title: Acianthera alpina
taxonomy: Acianthera alpina is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. This species belongs to the genus Acianthera, a group of orchids that are primarily native to the Americas. Acianthera alpina is further classified as a species within the orchid subfamily Epidendroideae, which comprises many epiphytic orchids. It is also classified as being part of the tribe Epidendreae, a subfamily of orchids that are primarily epiphytic. Acianthera alpina is further classified as being part of the section Aciantha, a subgenus within the genus Acianthera.
